# Batching Labor Ticket Issue

```sql
use datawarehouse
go

WITH CTE_INDIRECT AS
(SELECT 'INDIRECT' AS [LTTYPE]
, CAST(TRANSACTION_DATE AS DATE) AS TRANS_DATE
, *
FROM LABOR_TICKET LT
WHERE WORKORDER_BASE_ID IS NULL
AND TRANSACTION_DATE >= '11/1/2018'
AND HOURS_WORKED > 0.01
),

CTE_DIRECT AS
(SELECT 'DIRECT' AS [LTTYPE]
, CAST(TRANSACTION_DATE AS DATE) AS TRANS_DATE
, *
FROM LABOR_TICKET LT
WHERE WORKORDER_BASE_ID IS NOT NULL
AND TRANSACTION_DATE >= '11/1/2018'
)

SELECT *
FROM CTE_DIRECT D
INNER JOIN CTE_INDIRECT I
ON D.EMPLOYEE_ID = I.EMPLOYEE_ID
AND D.TRANS_DATE = I.TRANS_DATE
AND D.UNADJ_CLOCK_IN >= I.UNADJ_CLOCK_IN
AND D.UNADJ_CLOCK_OUT <= I.UNADJ_CLOCK_OUT


--SELECT * FROM LABOR_TICKET WHERE TRANSACTION_ID IN ('14615882', '14615883', '14615888', '14615889', '14624982', '14630366', '14641840', '14643876', '14655217', '14656236', '14663345', '14663694',
```
